privileged_info_summary: This task requires an agent to create a synthetic fisheries patrol training scenario in Bridge Command's Solent environment. The scenario directory must be created at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/p) Solent Fisheries Patrol with three INI files: environment.ini (Setting=Solent, StartTime=06.00, StartMonth=10, VisibilityRange=8.0, Weather=3.0), ownship.ini (vessel 'PV Sentinel' at ~50.62°N, ~1.15°W, speed 12 knots heading 045), and othership.ini with exactly 6 vessels positioned within the Solent geographic bounds (50.55-50.85°N, 1.60-0.90°W). Five radar configuration parameters must be set in bc5.ini: arpa_on=1, full_radar=1, radar_range_resolution=256, max_radar_range=72, and radar_angular_resolution=720. A briefing document must be created at /home/ga/Documents/fisheries_patrol_briefing.txt listing the patrol vessel and all 6 target vessels with enforcement priorities. Bridge Command is a real, open-source ship bridge simulator available at https://github.com/bridgecommand/bc.
